docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $704.10 FILED BY LOWRY, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT FERRELL, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
